sets.name: Basic Master Set
sets.summary: Python core, collections, files, testing, HTTP, automation, and ML fundamentals.

sets.name: Intermediate Master Set
sets.summary: Application structure, APIs, databases, testing, async, automation, and data workflows.

sets.name: Advanced Master Set
sets.summary: Concurrency, APIs, databases, resilience, observability, AI systems, and deployment.

sets.name: Automation
sets.summary: Scripting pipelines, scheduling, retries, optimization, and file workflows.

sets.name: Backend and Data
sets.summary: APIs, validation, SQL, transactions, ORM usage, caching, and service design basics.

sets.name: AI and Machine Learning
sets.summary: Model evaluation, embeddings, inference patterns, data leakage, RAG, and prompt reliability.

sets.name: System Design
sets.summary: Queues, idempotency, observability, failure isolation, scaling, and delivery tradeoffs.
